title: referrals — published events
description: Every event implements `ShouldDispatchAfterCommit` so listeners never fire against a rolled-back write. Two events are CRITICAL: `ReferralFraudDetected` (P1 signal — admin must review) and `ReferralProgramBudgetSpike` (P2 signal — > 50% program budget consumed in 24h suggests fraud storm OR viral traction OR budget mis-sizing). Financial events (ReferralVested / ReferralRewardMaterialized / ReferralRewarded / ReferralClawback) additionally fan out to finance (Wave 4) for credit + revenue attribution. ReferralSignedUp + ReferralVested fire a marketing event downstream for ad-network conversion attribution.

events.name: ReferralProgramCreated
events.trigger: ReferralProgramRepository finished a successful create. Fires exactly once per (tenant_id, slug) tuple.

events.name: ReferralProgramActivated
events.trigger: ReferralProgram.status transitioned draft -> active OR paused -> active. Program becomes eligible for new referral claims.

events.name: ReferralProgramPaused
events.trigger: ReferralProgram.status transitioned active -> paused. New claims refused; existing referrals in-flight complete.

events.name: ReferralProgramArchived
events.trigger: ReferralProgram.status transitioned to archived. Terminal — cascades: pending referrals cancel + materialized-not-yet-paid rewards clawback.

events.name: ReferralCodeIssued
events.trigger: ReferralCodeRepository committed a new referral_codes row. Fires exactly once per code. Distinguishes user_scoped (auto-generated per user) from campaign (admin-generated) from opaque (system-generated for A/B test cohorts).

events.name: ReferralCodeUsageCapReached
events.trigger: ReferralCode.usage_count reached ReferralCode.usage_cap. Fires from ReferralCodeObserver.updated when the increment crosses the threshold.

events.name: ReferralCodeExpired
events.trigger: ReferralCode.expires_at passed. Detected by claim-path (ReferralClaimer refuses expired code + fires this event) or by ExpireStaleReferralsJob scanning codes.

events.name: ReferralClicked
events.trigger: Public route GET /api/v1/referrals/claim/{code} was hit. Attribution snapshot + device snapshot captured; a Referral row in status 'pending_claim' may be created (depends on session state).
consumers: attribution::CaptureReferralClickTouchpoint (adds a touchpoint on the referrer's attribution profile)

payload.code_id: ULID | null (nullable when click carries no code — attribution-only)

events.name: ReferralClaimed
events.trigger: ReferralClaimer created a Referral row in status 'claimed' — the referred user landed on the signup page with the referral cookie set. Fires ONCE per referrer-referred pair.

events.name: ReferralSignedUp
events.trigger: Referral.status transitioned claimed -> signed_up. The referred user completed the signup flow.
consumers: marketing::CaptureReferralSignupAsConversion (fires a marketing event on the ad-network fan-out)

events.name: ReferralTriggerReached
events.trigger: The program-configured trigger event fired for the referred user (signup / trial_started / first_payment / subscription_renewal_1 / subscription_renewal_3 / lifetime_value_threshold_hit / athlete_enrolled / event_registered). The listener captures it + transitions Referral -> trigger_pending.

events.name: ReferralEnteredVesting
events.trigger: Referral.status transitioned trigger_pending -> vesting. VestingScheduler computed vesting_completes_at based on program config. For immediate-vesting programs, this fires in the same transaction as ReferralVested.

events.name: ReferralVested
events.trigger: Referral.status transitioned to vested — either by CheckReferralVestingJob (nightly, for hold-window programs) OR by immediate-vesting programs at trigger time OR by admin force-vest. ReferralReward rows created atomically in the same transaction.

payload.reward_ids: ULID[] (created reward rows — 1 for single_sided, 2 for double_sided)

events.name: ReferralRewardMaterialized
events.trigger: ReferralReward.status transitioned vested -> materialized — MaterializeVestedRewardsJob successfully created a Finance credit and set finance_credit_id.

events.name: ReferralRewarded
events.trigger: ReferralReward.status transitioned materialized -> paid. Referral.status transitioned vested -> rewarded when ALL rewards on the referral are paid. Terminal happy path.
consumers: audit::WriteToAuditLog (retention: 7 years — financial record + tax audit)

events.name: ReferralCancelled
events.trigger: Referral.status transitioned to cancelled — either voluntarily (admin cancel / referred withdrew) OR cascaded (program archived / refund issued / chargeback filed / fraud confirmed).
consumers: referrals::CascadeCancelOnRewards (any pending / vesting rewards move to cancelled; materialized rewards clawback)

events.name: ReferralExpired
events.trigger: ExpireStaleReferralsJob transitioned a claimed-but-not-signed-up referral past 30-day TTL to expired.

events.name: ReferralFraudDetected
events.trigger: ReferralFraudFlagObserver.created — a new fraud flag was written to the DB. CRITICAL when severity IN ('block', 'critical'). Every critical fire pages the admin.

events.name: ReferralFraudFlagReviewed
events.trigger: Admin reviewed a fraud flag — disposition set to confirmed_fraud / false_positive / manual_override_approved.

events.name: ReferralFraudDismissed
events.trigger: Admin reviewed a flag with disposition = false_positive. Fires alongside ReferralFraudFlagReviewed for consumer convenience (a listener may want only dismissals).

events.name: ReferralClawback
events.trigger: ReferralReward.status transitioned to clawback. Reverses a materialized-or-paid reward due to refund / chargeback / fraud / program-archived. CRITICAL — every clawback is a financial reversal that Finance module (Wave 4) must also process.

events.name: ReferralProgramBudgetReached
events.trigger: ReferralProgram.rewards_issued_count >= max_rewards_per_program OR rewards_issued_amount_cents crosses a threshold. New referral claims start refusing with PROGRAM_BUDGET_EXHAUSTED.

events.name: ReferralProgramBudgetSpike
events.trigger: > 50% of remaining program budget consumed in a rolling 24h window. Fired by ReconcileProgramBudgetJob. Ops signal — could be viral traction OR fraud storm.

events.name: ReferralMaxReferralsPerReferrerReached
events.trigger: A referrer's completed-referral count hit ReferralProgram.max_rewards_per_referrer or max_rewards_per_period. Further claims by this referrer refuse until the period rolls or the program allows more.

events.name: ReferralInvitationSent
events.trigger: A user called POST /api/v1/me/invitations to send an invitation email/SMS. Fires per invitation recipient.
consumers: notifications::DispatchInvitationEmail (delivers the invitation to the recipient)

events.name: ReferralInvitationClicked
events.trigger: The invitation URL was hit (redirect endpoint captures the click). Different from ReferralClicked (general referral link) — this is specifically from an emailed / SMS'd invitation.
